title: The Orange Years: The Nickelodeon Story
original_title: The Orange Years: The Nickelodeon Story
overview: A journey behind the scenes of the Nickelodeon television network to chronicle its unprecedented success, from its humble origins as a small local channel to its status as an international phenomenon that helped shape an entire generation of children.
